$schema: Section Registry — maps business type to recommended component variants
instructions: Read this file to select the right component variant for each section. Read the selected component file, then customize: replace placeholder copy with real copy from intake, apply design system colors via CSS variables, adjust content to match the business.

hero-centered.description: Centered headline + subtitle + CTA with gradient background accent. Clean, modern, conversion-focused.

hero-split.description: Left text + right image/visual split. Professional, trust-building.

hero-gradient.description: Bold gradient mesh background with centered content. Eye-catching, modern.

features-grid.description: 3-column icon + title + description card grid. Clean and scannable.

features-alternating.description: Alternating left-right layout with image + text blocks. Storytelling format.

features-icons.description: Large icon blocks with detailed descriptions. Feature-rich products.

testimonials-cards.description: 3-column testimonial cards with avatar, name, role, and quote.

testimonials-featured.description: Single large featured testimonial with photo and detailed quote. High-trust.

testimonials-marquee.description: Auto-scrolling horizontal marquee of testimonial cards. Social proof at scale.

pricing-two-tier.description: Two pricing cards side by side with feature comparison. Simple choice.

pricing-three-tier.description: Three-tier pricing with highlighted recommended plan. Standard SaaS pattern.

pricing-simple.description: Single price with included features list. No comparison needed.

faq-accordion.description: Expandable accordion with smooth animations. shadcn Accordion component.

faq-two-column.description: Two-column grid of Q&A pairs. All visible, no interaction needed.

cta-centered.description: Centered headline + subtitle + button on dark/accent background. High contrast.

cta-with-form.description: Split layout with copy on left, form on right. Direct conversion.

cta-banner.description: Full-width gradient banner with email capture. Urgency-driven.

process-numbered.description: Numbered steps (1-2-3-4) with connecting line. Clear process visualization.

process-cards.description: Step cards in a horizontal row. Each with icon, title, description.

footer-simple.description: Minimal footer with logo, social links, and copyright.

footer-multi-column.description: Multi-column footer with link groups, newsletter signup, and social.

navbar-simple.description: Sticky navbar with logo, nav links, and CTA button. Mobile hamburger menu.

logos-bar.description: 'Trusted by' logo bar. Grayscale logos in a row with hover color reveal.

problem-agitation.description: PAS (Problem-Agitate-Solution) section with pain points and transition to solution.
